_doc: Local event-memory retrieval eval. corpus = memories to seed into a temp DB; cases = queries + the corpus key they must recall. Dimensions: plain (lexical overlap, FTS must keep hitting), cross_language (query and memory use different words for the same thing -> FTS cannot, vector should), paraphrase (same meaning reworded -> FTS mostly cannot), distractor (a similar-but-wrong memory must not outrank the right one). Corpus texts for cross_language/paraphrase are deliberately lexically DISJOINT from their query so the FTS-only baseline honestly shows the gap that direction-1 (local vectors) must close.

corpus.text: 虎哥主力开发用的是 MacBook Pro
tigermemory 生产环境跑在火山引擎的服务器上
本地记忆打算用向量余弦做二阶段重排提升召回
outbox worker 失败任务按 1 分钟 5 分钟 30 分钟退避重试
schema v4 用 content_sha256 加 topic 做精确去重
组合最高权重主题是高股息现金流底仓
苹果公司股票目前不在虎哥的投资组合里
上一段会话在 Cursor 里改检索代码卡在了单元测试

cases.query: 语义搜索是怎么实现的
